ath_harper.headline: How you process the game
ath_harper.summary: Competitive drive is the edge; the growth lever is faster reset after mistakes.

domains.name: Composure
domains.summary: How steady you stay when the moment gets big.

domains.name: Focus
domains.summary: How well you lock in pitch to pitch.

domains.name: Resilience
domains.summary: How fast you bounce back after a mistake.

domains.name: Confidence
domains.summary: How much you trust your game in big counts.

domains.name: Competitive Drive
domains.summary: How much you want the ball when it matters.

drills.title: 10-Second Reset
drills.description: Train your edge: a between-pitch routine to clear the last play.
steps: One breath in for 4, out for 6

drills.title: Anchor Routine
drills.description: Tie focus to a physical cue so it returns on demand.

drills.title: First-Pitch Visualization
drills.description: See the first pitch before it happens so the moment feels familiar.
steps: Run the first pitch three ways

drills.title: Pressure Ladder
drills.description: Practice the same rep while imagining rising stakes, rung by rung.

drills.title: Flush the Inning
drills.description: A dugout ritual that ends the last inning so the next one starts clean.

drills.title: Wins Log
drills.description: Bank three concrete wins from today you can withdraw under pressure.

drills.title: Ignition Routine
drills.description: A repeatable spark for flat days: get to your competitive temperature on demand.

drills.title: Scout Yourself
drills.description: Write the scouting report an opponent would make on your mental game.
steps: List what pressure does to you
List what you do to pressure

drills.title: Two-Breath Reset
drills.description: The fastest legal reset in the game: two breaths between pitches.

drills.title: Target Lock
drills.description: Narrow your eyes to one seam, one spot, one job.

guides.title: What Clutch Factor measures
guides.summary: The mental side of performance, as a single trackable score.

guides.title: How to use your score
guides.summary: Turn your number into reps that move it.

guides.title: Recruiting & NIL playbook
guides.summary: How to present your mental game to college coaches.

guides.title: Reading your NTerpret
guides.summary: Turn the five domains into a plan.

guides.title: Building a drill habit
guides.summary: Small daily reps beat big rare sessions.

guides.title: After a tough game
guides.summary: What to say on the drive home — and what to skip.
